description: Letter of plea from the wife of Abū l-Faraj to al-Shaykh al-Thiqa, in the Muṣāsa area of Fustat. In Arabic script. The wife is desperately seeking help from the addressee as a debtor is pressing her for money. The husband, Abū l-Faraj, is incarcerated, and the wife sold his shop to pay off the debt. She says at least twice that she is the one not present, while the addressee is, probably requesting to check on him and relay his news.
description_he: מכתב בערבית לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
